page.title: Pick Your Weapon, Forge Your Path
page.description: Quinfall has no class in the traditional sense — the weapon in your hand is your class. Ten weapons, ten ways to play. Carry two at once, and your secondary turns you into a different player entirely.

grid.heading: ALL WEAPONS
grid.title: Ten Weapons, Ten Characters
grid.subtitle: Each weapon has its own skill tree, its own 100-level path and its own role. Mix two and shape a build that's truly yours.

combos.heading: COMBINATIONS
combos.title: Two Weapons, One Build
combos.subtitle: In Quinfall you carry a secondary too. Here are the most-played pairings — each one a distinct archetype the community has built around.

paladin.name: Paladin
paladin.description: Hold the front, plant the shield, and drop a heal when your group needs it. The PvE raid evergreen.

crusader.name: Crusader
crusader.description: Open as a tank, swap to the great-sword when the gap opens. A classic bruiser that shifts gears mid-fight.

berserker.name: Berserker
berserker.description: No shield, no range — pure damage. Open with the great-sword, finish with the hammer; if no healer's around, you'll outlive them anyway.

reaver.name: Reaver
reaver.description: Charge in with the axes, peel out and pop a crossbow shot from range. Big swings on short windows.

assassin.name: Assassin
assassin.description: Daggers and bow. The PvP hunter — sticks to backs, escapes when it has to, punishes a single mistake.

dragoon.name: Dragoon
dragoon.description: Hold the gap with the spear, punish from range with the bow. Mid-range pressure that's a nightmare to peel.

ranger.name: Ranger
ranger.description: Harass with the bow, draw the daggers if anyone closes. The textbook solo PvE and gank-survivor.

sniper.name: Sniper
sniper.description: Crossbow for crit hunts; the hammer is what answers anyone who closes the gap.

battlemage.name: Battlemage
battlemage.description: Lay AoE with the staff, swap to the life staff to keep yourself and the team upright. A confident mage.

cleric.name: Cleric
cleric.description: Life staff lead, staff backup. Heal first, but ready to lay down damage when the moment opens.

templar.name: Templar
templar.description: Healer-tank hybrid. Life staff keeps the team standing; the shield keeps you standing in the front row.

spellblade.name: Spellblade
spellblade.description: Stick with daggers, finish a combo, then drop a staff burst on top. High ceiling, high skill.

leveling.heading: PROGRESSION
leveling.title: Every Weapon Goes to 100
leveling.subtitle: The weapon in your hand is the weapon that levels. Independent of your character level, weapon mastery climbs from 1 to {{max}}; each milestone unlocks a new ability, passive or upgrade.

1.title: Equip the Weapon
1.body: Whatever you're holding earns the XP. Mobs in PvE, players in PvP, bosses in dungeons — every hit feeds your weapon level.

2.title: Open the Tree
2.body: Levels 10, 25, 50 and 75 each open new branches in the weapon tree. Slot passives, pair actives, build the kit you actually want.

3.title: Reach 100
3.body: At max level the weapon's signature legendary passive unlocks. Finish one weapon, move to the next — there's no penalty for swapping.

detail.signatureSkillsSub: The four abilities that define how this weapon plays.
detail.levelJourneySub: From 1 to {{max}} — what each milestone unlocks.
detail.recommendedCombosSub: The most-paired secondaries and the archetypes they create.
detail.alsoTrySub: Weapons with a similar rhythm worth picking up next.

swordShield.name: Sword & Shield
swordShield.tagline: The wall up front, the raid's evergreen
swordShield.summary: Pull aggro, soak the hits, give your group the room they need. Damage is modest but survivability is legendary — the most-wanted seat in dungeons and group PvP.
swordShield.lore: You learn the shield-bash in front of the smith on day one. For most players, this is the steadiest start in the game.
strengths: High HP and defense — you stay standing the longest.
Active block soaks the bulk of any incoming hit.
Provoke kit makes aggro management trivial.
With a group behind you, the toughest bosses fall in line.
weaknesses: Damage chart never puts you on top.
Stuck in melee — closing on ranged kiters takes time.
A broken shield or mistimed parry is a real opening.

skills.name: Shield Bash
skills.description: Short-range stagger hit. Breaks stances and opens the next combo.

skills.name: Provoke
skills.description: Pulls aggro from everything around you — the bread and butter of tanking.

skills.name: Castle Stance
skills.description: Briefly slashes incoming damage by a large margin.

skills.name: Shield Half
skills.description: A short-duration defensive dome over your group at boss windows.

milestones.25: Passive: stamina returns on each successful block.
milestones.50: Castle Stance — your long-form defensive cooldown.
milestones.75: Protective aura that radiates to nearby allies.
milestones.100: Shield Half legendary: a group-wide defensive dome at boss windows.

twoHandedSword.name: Two-Handed Sword
twoHandedSword.summary: Animations are slow but every swing carves through anyone foolish enough to bunch up. Built for AoE farming and chaotic PvP scrums.
twoHandedSword.lore: When NPCs see you swing this thing two-handed, they step back. The greatsword is a statement.
strengths: Wide arcs — stacking damage in crowds.
Damage-per-effort is excellent for PvE farming.
Heavy single-hit combos shut targets down.
Animation locks come with strong cancel options at the right milestones.
weaknesses: Single-target loses to bow and staff.
Slow swings make you predictable to skilled opponents.
Almost no damage while moving — positioning is everything.

skills.name: Wide Swing
skills.description: Half-circle AoE that always catches at least two.

skills.name: Slam
skills.description: Leap and crash; landing creates an AoE stagger.

skills.name: Shield Breaker
skills.description: Heavy single-hit that drops the target's defense.

skills.name: Battle Hymn
skills.description: Short damage buff — perfect AoE opener.

milestones.25: Passive: stamina back from AoE hits.
milestones.100: Battle Hymn legendary: short +15% party damage buff.

spear.name: Spear
spear.summary: A balanced weapon that can poke from mid-range or stab up close. Devastating in skilled hands, but unforgiving on the way up.
spear.lore: First pick of arena professionals — the spear is defense, offense and gap control all in one shaft.
strengths: Mid-range pressure — pulls opponents out of comfort.
Stagger and knock-back lets you chain CC.
High effective hitbox — even glancing strikes register.
Big positioning advantage in PvP.
weaknesses: Maxing DPS demands tight timing.
Closing windows leave brief openings.
Weak AoE — struggles against multi-target.

skills.name: Thrust
skills.description: Fast poke that nudges the target a meter back.

skills.name: Leap Strike
skills.description: Jump to your target — instant gap-closer.

skills.name: Vortex
skills.description: Spin around yourself for AoE damage and stagger.

skills.name: Plant Banner
skills.description: Drive the spear into the ground for a buff zone.

milestones.25: Passive: extra range bonus on critical hits.
milestones.50: Leap Strike — gap-close and disengage in one button.
milestones.100: Plant Banner legendary: +10% range to allies in zone.

dualAxes.name: Dual Axes
dualAxes.summary: Stack hits per second and stagger anything in front of you. Defenses are paper-thin; this is hit-and-run played at full speed.
dualAxes.lore: The signature kit of the northern clans. Two axes in Quinfall mean one thing: someone has come to settle scores.
strengths: Very high hit frequency — bleeds melt targets.
Frenzy mechanic gets stronger as enemies fall.
Damage while moving — flexible positioning.
Cheap and fast as a starter weapon.
weaknesses: Paper defenses — one mistake snowballs.
Lacks stagger for boss fights.
Damage ceiling outside crits is average.

skills.name: Twin Slash
skills.description: Quick X-slash applying two bleeds.

skills.name: Blood Call
skills.description: Short attack-speed buff that refreshes each kill.

skills.name: Charge
skills.description: Sprint forward, leaving bleed on whatever you pass.

skills.name: Berserk Rush
skills.description: Brief +damage / -defense state.

milestones.75: Charge — manoeuvre and damage in one.

dualDaggers.name: Dual Daggers
dualDaggers.summary: One of the fastest kits in the game. You hunt for crits and decide engagements — but a single mistake puts you on the floor. A monster in PvP.
dualDaggers.lore: Not a thief's weapon — an assassin's. One of the most-feared kits in Quinfall arenas.
strengths: Massive crit and movement bonuses.
Backstab multiplier — proper positioning hits twice as hard.
Disengage tools to leave a fight alive.
Best solo PvE farm rate in the game.
weaknesses: Tiny defense — a single root or stun ends you.
Weak AoE; bottom-of-chart in raid DPS.
Damage ceiling against tank archetypes is limited.

skills.name: Backstab
skills.description: +200% damage when struck from behind. The classic opener.

skills.name: Shadow Step
skills.description: Short-range teleport — escape or close.

skills.name: Poison Blade
skills.description: Applies a 6-second poison tick on hit.

skills.name: Quick Reflex
skills.description: Reflects a slice of incoming damage for a short window.

milestones.100: Quick Reflex legendary: 40% reflect for 4 seconds.

warHammer.name: War Hammer
warHammer.summary: Slow, but terrifying. A single charged blow can swing the bar; when you connect, the damage chart makes it obvious who's carrying.
warHammer.lore: The siege weapon for the people who can't reach the wall — and probably don't need to.
strengths: Single-hit damage near the top of the roster.
Stagger and knockdown floor opponents.
Armor-break passive — heavy targets hate this.
Bonus damage to gates and walls in sieges.
weaknesses: Slow — a whiff is a real opening.
Low movement speed — no answer for ranged kiters.
Sustained DPS is mid-tier.

skills.name: Slam
skills.description: Heavy AoE stun. Opens fights.

skills.name: Armor Crack
skills.description: Reduces target defense for several seconds.

skills.name: Hammer Bomb
skills.description: Throw the hammer; it explodes on return.

skills.name: Yoke
skills.description: Single-target knockdown with a brief stop.

bow.name: Bow
bow.tagline: Death from a distance, constant pressure
bow.summary: Mobile, accurate, relentless. Struggles up close — positioning is the entire skill ceiling.
bow.lore: An archer's call in the Quinfall woods is the warning before a caravan ambush.
strengths: Long-range pressure — you decide the fight.
Damage while moving — kiting is the gameplan.
High sustained single-target DPS.
Flexible boss-fight positioning in PvE.
weaknesses: DPS drops when enemies close.
Cloth defenses — front line ends you.
Demands tracking; mispositioning is fatal.

skills.name: Quick Shot
skills.description: Short-cooldown double arrow — sustained pressure.

skills.name: Rain of Arrows
skills.description: Wide AoE downpour for area denial.

skills.name: Mark Shot
skills.description: Tag a target so allies hit harder.

skills.name: Backstep
skills.description: Hop back while firing — the spacing tool.

milestones.25: Passive: no movement penalty on damage.

crossbow.name: Crossbow
crossbow.summary: Slow rate of fire, brutal multipliers. In a boss fight a single shot can re-open the gap.
crossbow.lore: Castle-wall snipers' weapon — one bolt through the right window can decide a war.
strengths: Outrageous crit multiplier.
One-shot alpha damage.
Strong boss-damage passives.
Siege range usable like artillery.
weaknesses: High reload — no sustained pressure.
Anchored stance — bad while moving.
Loses to fast targets in PvP.

skills.name: Heavy Bolt
skills.description: Single hit that triples on crit.

skills.name: Trap Bolt
skills.description: Ground shot that slows anyone walking through.

skills.name: Rapid Cocking
skills.description: +50% fire rate for a short window.

skills.name: Chain Shot
skills.description: Single shot that bounces to two more nearby targets.

milestones.100: Chain Shot legendary: bounces to up to four targets.

staff.name: Staff
staff.tagline: Bend the elements, control the field
staff.summary: A radiant PvE damage dealer with sweeping AoE. Robes only — keep your distance and let the spells speak.
staff.lore: The Vawraek Academy graduates' signature. A staff player wins fights with light and ice instead of words.
strengths: Powerful AoE — top-tier raid trash clearer.
Element chain combos compound damage.
Control kit — root, slow, freeze.
Mana economy holds up in long fights.
weaknesses: Cloth-tier physical defense.
Heavy movement penalty during casts.
Defenseless when the gap closes.

skills.name: Fireball
skills.description: Wide-area explosion leaving a burning patch.

skills.name: Frost Chains
skills.description: Slow / lock target and surroundings briefly.

skills.name: Lightning Arc
skills.description: Bouncing electric damage across multiple targets.

skills.name: Element Call
skills.description: Brief +magic damage buff.

milestones.25: Passive: mana back on AoE hits.
milestones.100: Element Call legendary: 8s of +25% magic damage.

lifeStaff.name: Life Staff
lifeStaff.tagline: Keep them standing, decide the fight
lifeStaff.summary: Heals and support magic. Quiet alone, royalty in a group — a strong life-staff player is the spine of every raid.
lifeStaff.lore: A life-staff player tilts the war with spells, not words. A weak healer means a lost fight.
strengths: Smooth shift between single-target and party heals.
Constant background heal aura.
Resurrect and buff kit — flips fights.
Effectively endless sustain when played well.
weaknesses: Weak solo damage — PvE is a slog alone.
Priority target for any enemy.
Mana mismanagement collapses the whole party.

skills.name: Healing Strike
skills.description: Big single-target burst heal.

skills.name: Healing Aura
skills.description: Continuous heal to allies in range.

skills.name: Light Call
skills.description: Drop a zone — heals double inside it.

skills.name: Call from Death
skills.description: Resurrect a recently fallen ally.

milestones.100: Call from Death legendary: cooldown halved.
